logResult(`${objName} address field '${field}' is string`, exists);
// Nullable or string fields in bill_to/sold_to
const valid = val === null || typeof val === "string";
logResult(`${objName} field '${field}' is null or string`, valid);
// first_name and last_name must be strings
pm.test(`${objName} first_name and last_name are strings`, () => {
// 6. Validate tax_certificate object and start_date string
// 7. Validate custom_fields keys presence and nullable/string values
pm.test("Validate custom_fields keys and nullable/string values", () => {
const valid = val === null || typeof val === "string";
logResult(`custom_fields '${key}' is null or string`, valid);
